what: Extract YAML frontmatter from each file
why: Parse metadata from each knowledge entry for indexing

output.console: Parse results with success/failure count per file

success_handling.criteria: YAML frontmatter is extracted from all discovered markdown files and parsed into structured objects

error_handling.criteria: One or more files contain malformed YAML frontmatter that cannot be parsed
error_handling.action: Skip the malformed file, log warning with file path and error, continue parsing remaining files

decisions.outcome: Skip failed files, proceed to validate-metadata step with successfully parsed entries
